Defendant Robert Goldstein'S Motion To Compel Further Deposition Testimony From Plaintiff Matthew D. Miller And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY DEAN ROYER OF LAW OFFICE OF DEAN ROYER TEL NO. 415-795-1475 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY ALLAN J. GOMES OF ANDERIES AND GOMES LAW TEL NO. 415-217-8802 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING- A R G U E D, Defendant Robert Goldstein'S Motion To Compel Further Deposition Testimony From Plaintiff Matthew D. Miller IS GRANTED And For Monetary Sanctions IS DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Deposition Testimony From Plaintiff Matthew D. Miller And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; DEFENDANT ROBERT GOLDSTEIN'S Motion To Compel Further Deposition Testimony From Plaintiff Matthew D. Miller And For Monetary Sanctions IS CONTINUED TO MAY 24 2017. Judge Pro tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
